name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll statements/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll statements/month, manual payroll processing causes late payroll distribution. We automate payroll generation and distribution instead of manual payroll processing and distribution.
problem_solved: Timely distribution of payroll statements and tax compliance.
features: issue alert notifications for HR teams
